title: "According Unto The Greatness Of Thy Mercy" Numbers 14:11-20

notes.introduction: An exposition of Numbers 14:11-20 on the mercy of God as recalled and invoked by Moses in his intercession for Israel following the evil report of the ten spies. The sermon traces Moses's appeal to God's previously revealed attributes (Exodus 34:6-7), his request for pardon, and God's response, set within the broader year-long series on the greatness of God.

sections.heading: Historical Background: Spies and Evil Report
What Moses Recalled: God's Revealed Mercy
What Moses Requested: Pardon for the People
God's Mercy Applied: Ephesians 2 and Gospel Witness
